title: coronopus squamatus
intro: Coronopus squamatus, also known as Sea Rocket, is a type of biennial plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, as well as possessing antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage. Coronopus squamatus is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be found in some traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
